intro:
Grow it. Stock it. Sell it.
Experience the full journey from farm to supermarket.
A relaxing and realistic farming supermarket simulator.
description:
Build your dream farm and manage your very own supermarket in Farming Supermarket Simulator — a relaxing and immersive experience where you control every step of the journey from soil to shelf.

Start by growing a variety of fresh crops on your farm. Plant seeds, water your fields, harvest produce, and expand your agricultural operations as you improve your efficiency and unlock new products. Careful planning and smart time management will help you create a steady flow of goods ready for sale.

Once harvested, transport your products to your supermarket and take full control of store operations. Stock shelves, organize displays, set prices, and keep customers happy with clean aisles and well-managed inventory. The better you run your store, the more customers you attract.

Balance farming and retail management as you reinvest profits into upgrading equipment, expanding farmland, and improving your supermarket layout. Optimize your workflow, reduce waste, and make strategic decisions to keep both your farm and store running smoothly.

With satisfying progression, accessible controls, and a calming gameplay loop, Farming Supermarket Simulator offers a complete farm-to-market simulation designed for players who enjoy management, organization, and steady growth.

Features:
• Grow and harvest a variety of crops
• Manage your own fully functional supermarket
• Stock shelves and organize product displays
• Set prices and monitor sales performance
• Upgrade your farm and store equipment
• Expand your land and retail space
• Relaxing gameplay with rewarding progression

Plant, harvest, stock, and sell — experience the full cycle of running a farming supermarket, all in one engaging simulator.
